agent_trace.raw_tail:
eck if we have any local data or try to install yfinance
import subprocess
import sys

try:
    import yfinance as yf
    print("yfinance available")
    
    # Try to get Micron data
    mu = yf.Ticker("MU")
    
    # Get quarterly financials
    print("\n=== Quarterly Financials ===")
    fin = mu.quarterly_financials
    print(fin.to_string()[:3000] if fin is not None else "No quarterly financials")
    
    # Get quarterly income stmt
    print("\n=== Quarterly Income Statement ===")
    income = mu.quarterly_income_stmt
    print(income.to_string()[:3000] if income is not None else "No income stmt")
    
    # Get calendar/earnings dates
    print("\n=== Calendar ===")
    cal = mu.calendar
    print(cal.to_string()[:2000] if cal is not None else "No calendar")
    
except ImportError:
    print("yfinance not available, trying to install...")
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "-m", "pip", "install", "yfinance", "-q"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(f"Install result: {result.returncode}")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

Micron's fiscal year ends in late August/early September. So Q3 2024 would be fiscal Q3 2024 which would be around March-May 2024.
